name: Seven-Minute Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 7 minutes
1. Combine all ingredients except vanilla in the top of a large double boiler.
2. Beat at low speed of an electric mixer for 30 seconds or until blended.
3. Place over boiling water and beat constantly on high speed for 7 minutes, or until stiff peaks form.
4. Remove from heat. Add vanilla and beat for 2 more minutes, or until frosting is thick enough to spread.
5. Yield: 4-1/4 cups.
